title: What a godly man does when he doesn't feel like it
caption:
Motivation is weather. Discipline is infrastructure.

The man who waits to feel ready builds nothing. Scripture never says wait — it says walk faithfully with what's already in your hand.

Show up before your mind does. Open the Bible before you feel like it. Train before you want to. Pray before the words come easy. The feeling follows the action. Not the other way around.

You already made the decision. You set the alarm, blocked the time, committed when you were thinking clearly. This morning isn't a renegotiation. Honor what you decided before the tired and the reluctant showed up.

Moses tended sheep for years before the burning bush. David ran his father's flocks before he ran a kingdom. God builds men in the ordinary, not the spectacular. "Whoever can be trusted with very little can also be trusted with much." — Luke 16:10

Save this for the morning it's hard to start.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #thework #selfmastery #christianity #scripture
